name: Imaginary Friend: Yuegui
description: A lovely ornament modeled after Yaoyao's imaginary friend Yuegui.\nEver since Aunty Cloud Retainer gave Yuegui to Yaoyao, the two have been inseparable. Every night before bed, Yaoyao carefully tucks Yuegui in under a little blanket, leaving only its tiny head peeking out. By morning, the blanket is always perfectly neat, and Yaoyao is sure Yuegui must have slept soundly through the night.\n"Real or imaginary, it's nice to grow up with friends by your side."
